'''Blufferavians''' were [[Bird/Legends|birds]] native to [[Borcorash]]. They laid speckled [[Egg/Legends|eggs]], and sometimes nested in rocky walls.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}

{{Interlang
|de=Felssegler
}}
